title: Coworking Fuel
description: Tavi Ember wants her clay oven running again — the Ember Kettle is your de facto startup HQ, and a startup runs on stew. The storms washed her clay stores into the pond.

steps.title: Dig up pond clay
steps.hint: Soft red mounds sit along the pond's sandy edge.

title: The Launch Jingle
description: Sera Bell insists your startup needs a launch sound — 'every great product makes a noise when it arrives' — and she swears the river has the best backing vocals in the Kiriko mountains.

steps.title: Collect river shells
steps.hint: Pearly spirals rest on the river banks in Whispergrass Valley.

title: The First Three Users
description: Every startup begins with three people who believe you. Mira's advice: stop polishing the pitch deck and go talk to the village.

steps.title: Pitch your startup around the village
steps.hint: Tavi holds court at the café, Ayo tinkers by the garden, Luma haunts the archive at Echo Haven.
